title: Fantastical Creatures
description: A small mod that contains different monsters and creatures
body:
REQUIRES GECKOLIB!!!!!!!

 

 

Fantastical Creatures is a small creature mod. This mod introduces 10 brand-new mobs, each with unique behaviors and drops. perfect for enhancing exploration, combat, and world atmosphere without overwhelming your game.

Whether you're looking for new challenges, fresh ambience, or fun additions for modpacks, this creature pack fits right in.

List of Mobs:

Funguy: A mushroom monster with an extremely bouncy cap.

Skeleton Brute: A skeleton with a hammer.

Rabid Beastman: A man turned beast, it gets aggravated when you attack it.

Torch-Wielding Beastman: A man turned beast, will set you on fire with his torchlight.

Soulmire: A vicious creature comprised of the souls in soul sand.

Iron Maiden: Do not let it get close enough to bite you.

Jawfish: A monster that hunts in packs.

Enderhand: Giant floating hand found in the end.

Mudflat: A very shy creature, it hides in the mud near mangrove swamps.

Frostbitten: A zombie that was in the cold too long, throws snowballs at you.

Goopy: Made out of a weird goopy substance, you can bottle it and drink it! But why would you do that? (Inspired by the LubGlubs from adventure time and specimen 2 from Spooky's Jumpscare Mansion)

Monolith: A giant stone being filled with ores.



Odder Things: Can be turned on and off as a configuration file, adds a couple of wacky things
